# kfile

```text
usage: kfile [-h] [--fd [FD]] [pid]

```

Displays information about fds accessible by a kernel task.
### Positional arguments

|Positional Argument|Help|
| :--- | :--- |
|pid||

### Optional arguments

|Short|Long|Help|
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
|-h|--help|show this help message and exit|
||--fd||
